subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the lights of divine guidance! Praise be unto God that thou hast entered the stream of eternity and drawn from the crystal fountain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بانوار هدایت الله حمد خدا را که بشریعه بقا وارد گشتی و از معین صافی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @living waters; water of life
